case_title: PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY VS. FREDERICK JEFFERY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERY, FREDERICK

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERY, FREDERICK DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-15-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-18-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-31-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-15-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEFFERY, FREDERICK $9,505.19 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,805.19, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-12-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY NIVINSKUS, MARK R
